heading: Rights and powers of a debtor in possession
label: 1184 Rights and powers of a debtor in possession
text: Subject to such limitations or conditions as the court may prescribe, a debtor in possession shall have all the rights, other than the right to compensation under , and powers, and shall perform all functions and duties, except the duties specified in paragraphs (2), (3), and (4) of , of a trustee serving in a case under this chapter, including operating the business of the debtor.section 330 of this titlesection 1106(a) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title
